free_text: Excitation functions for (p,n) reaction on nuclei of
Mo isotope in Ep interval from threshold to 7.2 MeV
Self-supporting metallic foils of Mo, thickness from
l00 cm3 and resolution about 4.keV for
cross section were on the average 8%. No other
